microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized deployment system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 deployment** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, adoption-ready model used across strategic customer integrations.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable deployment model for continuous customer-facing validation.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as end-to-end deployment lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, communicating project plans to both engineering and executive stakeholders.

Built an internal **AI agent** and restructured planning workflows to reduce deployment cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, delivering a scalable tooling layer that freed engineers to focus on high-value customer integration work.

Collaborated across product, engineering, and commercial teams to feed customer insights back into the platform roadmap, translating on-the-ground deployment learnings into prioritized feature requirements that shaped the Resilience Automation Platform's self-service capabilities.
microsoft_2023: Championed **platform adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting customer-style demos and hands-on training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly through workflow automation.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating field insights into prioritized requirements — mirroring FDE-style customer feedback loops.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and improving onboarding speed for new engineering teams adopting the platform.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, guiding 140+ teams through adoption and onboarding via structured workshops and best-practice documentation.

Drove a product strategy to eliminate deployment toil during region launches, conducting discovery with **20+ service teams** to identify 81 hours of manual effort per region, then building a roadmap to automate critical integration paths — directly enabling faster customer go-lives.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil and surface automation gaps across 140+ teams, equipping leadership with real-time visibility to prioritize high-impact deployment investments and communicate progress to executive stakeholders.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by owning end-to-end deployment strategy for a legacy OS migration, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and coordinating technical rollout with cross-functional engineering and operations teams.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process — maintaining deployment momentum across competing priorities in a fast-paced environment.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable integration model scalable across additional robotics fulfillment sites.
pro_painters: Increased **job bookings by 26%** by owning end-to-end customer onboarding and scoping lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, designing a new CRM-based workflow that standardized the intake process and improved conversion rates across the sales funnel.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to improve top-of-funnel performance and better align messaging with target customer segments.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify and seal margin leaks, delivering data-backed recommendations that shaped operational strategy and informed future customer proposal standards.

tailoring_notes: 'end-to-end deployment' (JD: 'end-to-end owner of the deployment process') woven into microsoft_ft bullet#2 and amazon_robotics bullet#1 to directly mirror FDE ownership language.

'customer onboarding and adoption' (JD: 'support customer onboarding and adoption') surfaced in microsoft_ft bullet#2 and pro_painters bullet#1 to frame Cyrus's track record in adoption-driving contexts.
'feed customer insights back into the roadmap' (JD verbatim) used in microsoft_ft bullet#6 to show Cyrus already operates in the FDE feedback-loop model Encord describes.

'demos and workshops / best practices' (JD: 'run demos, host workshops, guide customers with best practices') reflected in microsoft_2023 bullet#1 and microsoft_2022 bullet#1 to surface direct parallel experience.
'communicate project plans to both technical teams and executive stakeholders' (JD verbatim framing) embedded in microsoft_ft bullet#4 to show Cyrus can operate across both audiences Encord requires.
